title: lithocardium cuneiforme
intro: Lithocardium cuneiforme, also known as the Lithocarpus cuneatus, is a type of evergreen tree native to East Asia, particularly in China and Taiwan. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of Lithocardium cuneiforme include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. Lithocardium cuneiforme can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as tea, capsules, and extracts, to harness its medicinal properties.
